assets.description: Futuristic glass atrium corporate lobby with holographic display and employees — landing page hero banner
Woman seated alone in sterile observation room with surveillance cameras — recruitment/evaluation section visual
Geometric block mark in black and white — TCKR brand icon/favicon
Detailed facility systems plan labeled 'Aethel Behavioral Operations Park' with containment suites, audience areas, restoration pods — primary archive blueprint
Overcast exterior of secured facility with surveillance camera, fencing, and figures walking toward entrance — archive surveillance still
Top secret redacted operations report with black censor bars, 'CLASSIFIED // DO NOT REMOVE' stamp, and 'ARCHIVED' marking — primary archive document visual
Dark HUD-style background with faint data overlays and amber warning elements — terminal/system interface background
TCKR Systems evaluation portal showing candidate photo, psychometric radar charts, fingerprint scan, 'PROFILE APPROVED' stamp, and role assignment — final profile result screen graphic
Professional woman with brown hair, gray blazer, TCKR badge — maps to Dr. Lena Marsh or similar corporate role
Distinguished man with gray hair, green tie, TCKR badge labeled 'Ethics Compliance Officer' — maps to Dr. Aran Osei
Stern woman with short hair, teal blouse, TCKR badge labeled 'Park Operations Manager' — maps to Yuna Park (Remote Warden Operator)
Man with beard, dark hair, light blue shirt, TCKR badge — maps to Marcus Hale or James Whitfield
Glitched/pixelated portrait of a woman with corrupted badge — perfect for redacted employee EMP-0089 (Subject 0089)
